product.title: DREVO Excalibur 84-Key TKL Mechanical Keyboard RGB Backlit Blue Switch

verdictReason: Pricing is fair but mixed reviews include durability complaints and seller has limited history.
insights: Price ₹4,499 is competitive vs Keychron C1 at ₹4,599, so no pricing red flags
120+ reviews mention key-switch failure within 6 months — potential quality concern
Seller established 5 months ago with 3.9 rating — not enough track record for ₹4K+ purchase

sampleReviews.text: Good keyboard for the price. But my 'A' key stopped working after 4 months of use.
RGB is vibrant. Typing feel is satisfying. Hope it lasts long.
